title: GitHub - Saivineeth147/lora-speedrun: Speedrunning LoRA fine-tuning: frozen task, frozen hardware, public wall-clock leaderboard. modded-nanogpt for fine-tuning.
excerpt: Speedrunning LoRA fine-tuning: frozen task, frozen hardware, public wall-clock leaderboard. modded-nanogpt for fine-tuning. - Saivineeth147/lora-speedrun
content_html:
How fast can you LoRA-fine-tune Qwen2.5-1.5B to ≥ 57% on GSM8K — on a single L40S?

This is modded-nanogpt for fine-tuning: a frozen task, frozen hardware, and a public leaderboard of wall-clock records. Every record is independently re-run 3× with fresh seeds on identical hardware before it counts.

Attempting and verifying are free: official timing runs on a Modal L40S sandbox, and Modal's free monthly compute credits cover full runs — so anyone can compete, and anyone can re-verify any record with one command.

Leaderboard

Track 1 — GSM8K · Qwen2.5-1.5B · target ≥ 57.0% · 1× L40S

Current record: 1m 44s by @stared — Shortest-4k data pruning, 1 aggressive-LR epoch, <<...>> annotations stripped, custom GPU-resident packed loop, chunked completion-only CE (no full logits).

# Date Author Train time GSM8K/EM Δ Technique
0 2026-07-18 @Saivineeth147 11m 57s 59.4% — Baseline: plain LoRA r=16 on all linear layers, 3 epochs, cosine LR. No tricks. (report)
1 2026-07-18 @Saivineeth147 6m 05s 61.1% −49% Sequence packing + completion-only loss masking, 2 epochs. Same LoRA config as #0; ~2x faster at higher accuracy. (report)
2 2026-07-20 @stared 1m 53s 59.6% −69% One 4e-4 epoch over 3,000 examples with 2x optimizer updates (integrated-LR), 512-token packs. First outside record. (report)
3 2026-07-20 @stared 1m 44s 60.3% −8% Shortest-4k data pruning, 1 aggressive-LR epoch, <<...>> annotations stripped, custom GPU-resident packed loop, chunked completion-only CE (no full logits). (report)

Track 2 — SQuAD v1.1 · SmolLM2-1.7B · target ≥ 75.5% · 1× L40S

Current record: 11m 08s by @Saivineeth147 — Track 2 baseline: plain LoRA r=16 on SQuAD, first 20k examples, 1 epoch, full-sequence loss. No tricks.

# Date Author Train time GSM8K/EM Δ Technique
0 2026-07-20 @Saivineeth147 11m 08s 77.5% — Track 2 baseline: plain LoRA r=16 on SQuAD, first 20k examples, 1 epoch, full-sequence loss. No tricks. (report)

Full history with verification reports: records/RECORDS.md · Live leaderboard: huggingface.co/spaces/vineeth98/lora-speedrun

The tracks

Two frozen tracks, deliberately different model families and task types — so a technique only proves general by winning on both. Same hardware, caps, and verification everywhere.

Track 1 Track 2
Base model Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-1.7B
Task GSM8K math → ≥ 57.0% exact-match SQuAD v1.1 QA → ≥ 75.5% EM
Training data GSM8K train split only SQuAD train split only
Metric Training wall-clock. Lower wins. same
Hardware 1× L40S (48 GB), Modal sandbox same
Constraint adapter-only, ≤ 30M trainable params same

Machine-readable specs: spec.yaml · spec-t2.yaml. Full rules: TASK.md.

You control everything else: LoRA rank and placement, quantization, learning-rate schedules, sequence packing, data subset selection and ordering, custom kernels, when to stop. Train on 1,000 well-chosen examples for 90 seconds if you can make it clear the bar.

Why this exists

I fine-tune small models on a budget, and I couldn't tell which speedup claims were real. Every technique — DoRA, rsLoRA, Unsloth, packing tricks — reports numbers on different models, data, and hardware. In practice the claims are unfalsifiable.

The only format I've seen actually settle arguments like that is a frozen task with a referee. That's what nanoGPT's speedrun did for pretraining optimizers (Muon came out of it). This is the same arena for fine-tuning.

What it builds toward: a verified public record of which training tricks pay for themselves in wall-clock and which don't survive replication. Every record has to explain its mechanism in its write-up, so the leaderboard doubles as a lab notebook — the rejected-variants sections are often as useful as the records. And because tricks can overfit one setup, records live on tracks with different model families and task types: a technique only proves general by transferring.

Quickstart

Official-hardware run (free). Make a Modal account, then:

git clone https://github.com/Saivineeth147/lora-speedrun && cd lora-speedrun
pip install modal pyyaml && modal setup      # one-time browser auth

python harness/modal_verify.py --prefetch    # one-time: cache model + data in a volume

# one timed, evaluated attempt of the baseline on the exact spec hardware:
python harness/modal_verify.py --submission submissions/000-baseline --runs 1

# full record-style verification (3 fresh seeds, all must pass):
python harness/modal_verify.py --submission submissions/000-baseline --runs 3

Local iteration (optional). Any 24 GB+ card runs the baseline for fast experimenting — bash scripts/setup_gpu.sh, then python harness/run_submission.py submissions/000-baseline --runs 1. Local times aren't official; the leaderboard clock is the Modal L40S.

Then copy submissions/TEMPLATE/, make it faster, and open a PR. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

How records get verified

A real verification, replayed from the logs (seed 463953844, time-compressed): train → integrity + adapter audit → eval → 3-seed verdict.

  1. You open a PR with your training script, config, notes, and self-reported numbers.
  2. CI statically validates it, and an automated Claude security screen reviews the diff (exfiltration attempts, network use, harness tampering, test-set contact) and posts its findings publicly.
  3. A maintainer reviews the code, then comments /verify — which re-runs your submission 3× with fresh seeds in a network-blocked Modal sandbox on the spec L40S. All 3 runs must clear the target; official time is the mean.
  4. The harness audits the adapter param count and re-verifies model/data content hashes (anti-tampering), and the verification report is posted on the PR and committed to records/verifications/ with the accept/reject reasoning.

Full protocol, rubric, and threat model: JUDGING.md · SECURITY.md.

Ideas nobody has claimed yet

Taken so far: sequence packing + completion-only masking (record #1).

1-epoch aggressive-LR schedules · data pruning (train on the hardest 2k examples?) · block-diagonal/varlen packing attention · QLoRA NF4 vs bf16 tradeoff · rsLoRA / DoRA / PiSSA init · LoRA+ (asymmetric LR for A/B) · NEFTune noise · curriculum ordering · rank/placement search (MLP-only vs attention-only) · torch.compile · Unsloth kernels · Liger kernels · fused cross-entropy · smarter warmup for short runs

Claim one, beat 6m 05s, get your name on the board.

FAQ

Is this LoRa the radio protocol? No — LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation), the standard cheap way to fine-tune a language model: train a small adapter on top of a frozen model. The competition: everyone fine-tunes the same model to the same score on the same GPU, and the fastest verified training run holds the record.

Won't techniques overfit to one model + one task? That's exactly why there are two tracks with different model families and task types — and more will follow the same freeze-and-calibrate protocol. A trick that only wins on one track is a record, but the techniques worth trusting are the ones that transfer. The track system makes that an empirical question instead of an argument.

Why Qwen2.5-1.5B? Isn't it pretrained on math? Probably, like every modern base model. It doesn't matter: the target is an anchor, not a claim about mathematical discovery. The race is the interesting part — same reason nanoGPT speedrunning targets an arbitrary val loss. (Track 2 uses a different family, SmolLM2, partly for this reason.)

Why wall-clock instead of FLOPs or steps? Because wall-clock is what you pay for, and it forces kernels, data loading, and algorithms to compete in the same currency. Same rule as modded-nanogpt.

Why an L40S on Modal instead of a 4090 or H100? Three reasons. It's one consistent datacenter SKU, so times are actually comparable (rented consumer cards vary host-to-host). It's free to use via Modal's monthly credits, so competing and re-verifying costs nothing. And submissions are strangers' code — Modal sandboxes run them network-blocked and secretless. (The L40S is the same AD102 silicon as the 4090, so consumer-GPU tricks transfer.)

Can I train on other data / distill from a bigger model? No. GSM8K train split only, no teacher models, no synthetic data. See TASK.md for the full banned list.

Multiple GPUs? No. One L40S. That's the point.

License

MIT. Records, reports, and write-ups are as public as the code.

sentences.en: Train on 1,000 well-chosen examples for 90 seconds if you can make it clear the bar.
sentences.zh: 如果您可以通过 1,000 个精心挑选的示例，进行 90 秒的训练。

sentences.en: Why this exists
sentences.zh: 为什么存在这个

blocks.html_en: I fine-tune small models on a budget, and I couldn't tell which speedup claims were real. Every technique — DoRA, rsLoRA, Unsloth, packing tricks — reports numbers on different models, data, and hardware. In practice the claims are unfalsifiable.

sentences.en: I fine-tune small models on a budget, and I couldn't tell which speedup claims were real.
sentences.zh: 我根据预算对小型模型进行了微调，但我无法判断哪些加速声明是真实的。

sentences.en: Every technique — DoRA, rsLoRA, Unsloth, packing tricks — reports numbers on different models, data, and hardware.
sentences.zh: 每一种技术——DoRA、rsLoRA、Unsloth、打包技巧——都会报告不同模型、数据和硬件的数字。

sentences.en: In practice the claims are unfalsifiable.
sentences.zh: 实际上，这些主张是不可证伪的。

blocks.html_en: The only format I've seen actually settle arguments like that is a frozen task with a referee. That's what nanoGPT's speedrun did for pretraining optimizers (Muon came out of it). This is the same arena for fine-tuning.

sentences.en: The only format I've seen actually settle arguments like that is a frozen task with a referee.
sentences.zh: 我见过的唯一真正解决争论的方式是与裁判一起进行冻结任务。

sentences.en: That's what nanoGPT's speedrun did for pretraining optimizers (Muon came out of it).
sentences.zh: 这就是 nanoGPT 的 speedrun 对预训练优化器所做的事情（Muon 就是从中诞生的）。

sentences.en: This is the same arena for fine-tuning.
sentences.zh: 这也是微调的同一个舞台。

blocks.html_en: What it builds toward: a verified public record of which training tricks pay for themselves in wall-clock and which don't survive replication. Every record has to explain its mechanism in its write-up, so the leaderboard doubles as a lab notebook — the rejected-variants sections are often as useful as the records. And because tricks can overfit one setup, records live on tracks with different model families and task types: a technique only proves general by transferring.

sentences.en: What it builds toward: a verified public record of which training tricks pay for themselves in wall-clock and which don't survive replication.
sentences.zh: 它的目标是：一个经过验证的公共记录，记录哪些训练技巧可以在挂钟中得到回报，哪些无法复制。

sentences.en: Every record has to explain its mechanism in its write-up, so the leaderboard doubles as a lab notebook — the rejected-variants sections are often as useful as the records.
sentences.zh: 每条记录都必须在其文字中解释其机制，因此排行榜兼作实验室笔记本——被拒绝的变体部分通常与记录一样有用。

sentences.en: And because tricks can overfit one setup, records live on tracks with different model families and task types: a technique only proves general by transferring.
sentences.zh: 而且由于技巧可能会过度适应一种设置，因此会在具有不同模型系列和任务类型的轨道上实时记录：一项技术只能通过转移来证明通用性。

sentences.en: Quickstart
sentences.zh: 快速入门

blocks.html_en: Official-hardware run (free). Make a Modal account, then:

sentences.en: Official-hardware run (free).
sentences.zh: 官方硬件运行（免费）。

sentences.en: Make a Modal account, then:
sentences.zh: 创建一个 Modal 帐户，然后：

blocks.html_en: Local iteration (optional). Any 24 GB+ card runs the baseline for fast experimenting — bash scripts/setup_gpu.sh, then python harness/run_submission.py submissions/000-baseline --runs 1. Local times aren't official; the leaderboard clock is the Modal L40S.

sentences.en: Local iteration (optional).
sentences.zh: 局部迭代（可选）。

sentences.en: Any 24 GB+ card runs the baseline for fast experimenting — bash scripts/setup_gpu.sh, then python harness/run_submission.py submissions/000-baseline --runs 1.
sentences.zh: 任何 24 GB 以上的卡都会运行快速实验的基线 — bash script/setup_gpu.sh，然后是 pythonharness/run_submission.pysubmissions/000-baseline --runs 1。

sentences.en: Local times aren't official; the leaderboard clock is the Modal L40S.
sentences.zh: 当地时间不是官方时间；排行榜时钟是 Modal L40S。

blocks.html_en: Then copy submissions/TEMPLATE/, make it faster, and open a PR. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

sentences.en: Then copy submissions/TEMPLATE/, make it faster, and open a PR.
sentences.zh: 然后复制提交/TEMPLATE/，使其更快，并打开 PR。

sentences.en: See CONTRIBUTING.md.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md。

sentences.en: How records get verified
sentences.zh: 如何验证记录

blocks.html_en: A real verification, replayed from the logs (seed 463953844, time-compressed): train → integrity + adapter audit → eval → 3-seed verdict.

sentences.en: A real verification, replayed from the logs (seed 463953844, time-compressed): train → integrity + adapter audit → eval → 3-seed verdict.
sentences.zh: 真实的验证，从日志重播（种子 463953844，时间压缩）：训练 → 完整性 + 适配器审核 → 评估 → 3 种子判决。

blocks.html_en: • You open a PR with your training script, config, notes, and self-reported numbers.

sentences.en: You open a PR with your training script, config, notes, and self-reported numbers.
sentences.zh: 您可以使用训练脚本、配置、注释和自我报告的数字打开 PR。

blocks.html_en: • CI statically validates it, and an automated Claude security screen reviews the diff (exfiltration attempts, network use, harness tampering, test-set contact) and posts its findings publicly.

sentences.en: CI statically validates it, and an automated Claude security screen reviews the diff (exfiltration attempts, network use, harness tampering, test-set contact) and posts its findings publicly.
sentences.zh: CI 对其进行静态验证，自动 Claude 安全屏幕会审查差异（渗透尝试、网络使用、线束篡改、测试集接触）并公开发布其发现。

blocks.html_en: • A maintainer reviews the code, then comments /verify — which re-runs your submission 3× with fresh seeds in a network-blocked Modal sandbox on the spec L40S. All 3 runs must clear the target; official time is the mean.

sentences.en: A maintainer reviews the code, then comments /verify — which re-runs your submission 3× with fresh seeds in a network-blocked Modal sandbox on the spec L40S.
sentences.zh: 维护人员审查代码，然后评论/验证 - 这会在规范 L40S 上的网络阻塞 Modal 沙箱中使用新鲜种子重新运行您的提交 3 倍。

sentences.en: All 3 runs must clear the target; official time is the mean.
sentences.zh: 所有 3 次运行都必须清除目标；官方时间是平均值。

blocks.html_en: • The harness audits the adapter param count and re-verifies model/data content hashes (anti-tampering), and the verification report is posted on the PR and committed to records/verifications/ with the accept/reject reasoning.

sentences.en: The harness audits the adapter param count and re-verifies model/data content hashes (anti-tampering), and the verification report is posted on the PR and committed to records/verifications/ with the accept/reject reasoning.
sentences.zh: 线束审核适配器参数计数并重新验证模型/数据内容哈希（防篡改），验证报告发布在 PR 上并提交记录/验证/并带有接受/拒绝推理。

blocks.html_en: Full protocol, rubric, and threat model: JUDGING.md · SECURITY.md.

sentences.en: Full protocol, rubric, and threat model: JUDGING.md · SECURITY.md.
sentences.zh: 完整协议、标题和威胁模型：JUDGING.md · SECURITY.md。

blocks.html_en: Ideas nobody has claimed yet

sentences.en: Ideas nobody has claimed yet
sentences.zh: 尚未有人认领的创意

blocks.html_en: Taken so far: sequence packing + completion-only masking (record #1).

sentences.en: Taken so far: sequence packing + completion-only masking (record #1).
sentences.zh: 到目前为止：序列打包+仅完成掩码（记录#1）。

blocks.html_en: 1-epoch aggressive-LR schedules · data pruning (train on the hardest 2k examples?) · block-diagonal/varlen packing attention · QLoRA NF4 vs bf16 tradeoff · rsLoRA / DoRA / PiSSA init · LoRA+ (asymmetric LR for A/B) · NEFTune noise · curriculum ordering · rank/placement search (MLP-only vs attention-only) · torch.compile · Unsloth kernels · Liger kernels · fused cross-entropy · smarter warmup for short runs

sentences.en: 1-epoch aggressive-LR schedules · data pruning (train on the hardest 2k examples?) · block-diagonal/varlen packing attention · QLoRA NF4 vs bf16 tradeoff · rsLoRA / DoRA / PiSSA init · LoRA+ (asymmetric LR for A/B) · NEFTune noise · curriculum ordering · rank/placement search (MLP-only vs attention-only) · torch.compile · Unsloth kernels · Liger kernels · fused cross-entropy · smarter warmup for short runs
sentences.zh: 1-epoch 激进 LR 计划 · 数据修剪（训练最难的 2k 个示例？） · 块对角线/varlen 打包注意力 · QLoRA NF4 与 bf16 权衡 · rsLoRA / DoRA / PiSSA init · LoRA+（A/B 的非对称 LR） · NEFTune 噪声 · 课程排序 · 排名/位置搜索（仅 MLP 与仅注意） · torch.compile · Unsloth内核 · Liger 内核 · 融合交叉熵 · 短期运行的更智能预热

blocks.html_en: Claim one, beat 6m 05s, get your name on the board.

sentences.en: Claim one, beat 6m 05s, get your name on the board.
sentences.zh: 领取第一名，跑完 6 米 05 秒，将你的名字写在黑板上。

blocks.html_en: Is this LoRa the radio protocol? No — LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation), the standard cheap way to fine-tune a language model: train a small adapter on top of a frozen model. The competition: everyone fine-tunes the same model to the same score on the same GPU, and the fastest verified training run holds the record.

sentences.en: Is this LoRa the radio protocol?
sentences.zh: 这是 LoRa 无线电协议吗？

sentences.en: No — LoRA (Low-Rank Adaptation), the standard cheap way to fine-tune a language model: train a small adapter on top of a frozen model.
sentences.zh: 不——LoRA（低阶适应），微调语言模型的标准廉价方法：在冻结模型上训练一个小适配器。

sentences.en: The competition: everyone fine-tunes the same model to the same score on the same GPU, and the fastest verified training run holds the record.
sentences.zh: 竞赛：每个人在相同的 GPU 上对相同的模型进行微调以达到相同的分数，并且最快的经过验证的训练运行保持着记录。

blocks.html_en: Won't techniques overfit to one model + one task? That's exactly why there are two tracks with different model families and task types — and more will follow the same freeze-and-calibrate protocol. A trick that only wins on one track is a record, but the techniques worth trusting are the ones that transfer. The track system makes that an empirical question instead of an argument.

sentences.en: Won't techniques overfit to one model + one task?
sentences.zh: 技术是否会过度适应一种模型+一项任务？

sentences.en: That's exactly why there are two tracks with different model families and task types — and more will follow the same freeze-and-calibrate protocol.
sentences.zh: 这正是为什么有两个具有不同模型系列和任务类型的轨道 - 并且更多轨道将遵循相同的冻结和校准协议。

sentences.en: A trick that only wins on one track is a record, but the techniques worth trusting are the ones that transfer.
sentences.zh: 仅在一条赛道上获胜的技巧就是一项记录，但值得信赖的技术是那些可以转移的技术。

sentences.en: The track system makes that an empirical question instead of an argument.
sentences.zh: 轨道系统使之成为一个经验问题，而不是一个争论。

blocks.html_en: Why Qwen2.5-1.5B? Isn't it pretrained on math? Probably, like every modern base model. It doesn't matter: the target is an anchor, not a claim about mathematical discovery. The race is the interesting part — same reason nanoGPT speedrunning targets an arbitrary val loss. (Track 2 uses a different family, SmolLM2, partly for this reason.)

sentences.en: Why Qwen2.5-1.5B?
sentences.zh: 为什么选择Qwen2.5-1.5B？

sentences.en: Isn't it pretrained on math?
sentences.zh: 难道不是经过数学预训练的吗？

sentences.en: Probably, like every modern base model.
sentences.zh: 可能，就像每个现代基础模型一样。

sentences.en: It doesn't matter: the target is an anchor, not a claim about mathematical discovery.
sentences.zh: 没关系：目标是一个锚点，而不是关于数学发现的主张。

sentences.en: The race is the interesting part — same reason nanoGPT speedrunning targets an arbitrary val loss.
sentences.zh: 比赛是有趣的部分——同样的原因，nanoGPT 速度跑的目标是任意的 val 损失。

sentences.en: (Track 2 uses a different family, SmolLM2, partly for this reason.)
sentences.zh: （轨道 2 使用不同的系列，SmolLM2，部分原因也是如此。）

blocks.html_en: Why wall-clock instead of FLOPs or steps? Because wall-clock is what you pay for, and it forces kernels, data loading, and algorithms to compete in the same currency. Same rule as modded-nanogpt.

sentences.en: Why wall-clock instead of FLOPs or steps?
sentences.zh: 为什么用挂钟而不是 FLOPs 或步骤？

sentences.en: Because wall-clock is what you pay for, and it forces kernels, data loading, and algorithms to compete in the same currency.
sentences.zh: 因为挂钟是你付出代价的，它迫使内核、数据加载和算法以相同的货币进行竞争。

sentences.en: Same rule as modded-nanogpt.
sentences.zh: 与 modded-nanogpt 相同的规则。

blocks.html_en: Why an L40S on Modal instead of a 4090 or H100? Three reasons. It's one consistent datacenter SKU, so times are actually comparable (rented consumer cards vary host-to-host). It's free to use via Modal's monthly credits, so competing and re-verifying costs nothing. And submissions are strangers' code — Modal sandboxes run them network-blocked and secretless. (The L40S is the same AD102 silicon as the 4090, so consumer-GPU tricks transfer.)

sentences.en: Why an L40S on Modal instead of a 4090 or H100?
sentences.zh: 为什么在 Modal 上使用 L40S 而不是 4090 或 H100？

sentences.en: Three reasons.
sentences.zh: 三个原因。

sentences.en: It's one consistent datacenter SKU, so times are actually comparable (rented consumer cards vary host-to-host).
sentences.zh: 它是一个一致的数据中心 SKU，因此时间实际上是可比的（租用的消费者卡因主机而异）。

sentences.en: It's free to use via Modal's monthly credits, so competing and re-verifying costs nothing.
sentences.zh: 它可以通过 Modal 的每月积分免费使用，因此竞争和重新验证不需要任何费用。

sentences.en: And submissions are strangers' code — Modal sandboxes run them network-blocked and secretless.
sentences.zh: 提交的内容是陌生人的代码——模态沙箱在网络封锁和秘密的情况下运行它们。

sentences.en: (The L40S is the same AD102 silicon as the 4090, so consumer-GPU tricks transfer.)
sentences.zh: （L40S 与 4090 是相同的 AD102 芯片，因此消费者 GPU 技巧可以转移。）

blocks.html_en: Can I train on other data / distill from a bigger model? No. GSM8K train split only, no teacher models, no synthetic data. See TASK.md for the full banned list.

sentences.en: Can I train on other data / distill from a bigger model?
sentences.zh: 我可以训练其他数据/从更大的模型中提取数据吗？

sentences.en: No. GSM8K train split only, no teacher models, no synthetic data.
sentences.zh: 不。仅 GSM8K 列车分割，没有教师模型，没有合成数据。

sentences.en: See TASK.md for the full banned list.
sentences.zh: 请参阅 TASK.md 了解完整的禁止列表。

blocks.html_en: Multiple GPUs? No. One L40S. That's the point.

sentences.en: Multiple GPUs?
sentences.zh: 多个 GPU？

sentences.en: No. One L40S.
sentences.zh: 一号L40S。

sentences.en: That's the point.
sentences.zh: 这就是重点。

sentences.en: License
sentences.zh: 执照

blocks.html_en: MIT. Records, reports, and write-ups are as public as the code.

sentences.en: MIT.
sentences.zh: 和。

sentences.en: Records, reports, and write-ups are as public as the code.
sentences.zh: 记录、报告和文章与代码一样公开。

content_html_zh:
在单个 L40S 上，LoRA 在 GSM8K 上将 Qwen2.5-1.5B 微调到 ≥ 57% 的速度有多快？

这是用于微调的 modded-nanogpt：冻结任务、冻结硬件和挂钟记录的公共排行榜。 每条记录在计数之前都会在相同的硬件上使用新鲜种子独立重新运行 3 次。

尝试和验证都是免费的：官方计时在 Modal L40S 沙箱上运行，Modal 的每月免费计算积分涵盖全部运行 - 因此任何人都可以竞争，任何人都可以使用一个命令重新验证任何记录。

排行榜

轨道 1 — GSM8K · Qwen2.5-1.5B · 目标 ≥ 57.0% · 1× L40S

当前记录：@stared 的 1m 44s — 最短 4k 数据修剪、1 个激进的 LR 纪元、剥离 <<...>> 注释、自定义 GPU 驻留打包循环、仅限分块完成的 CE（无完整 logits）。

# Date 作者 列车时间 GSM8K/EM Δ 技术
0 2026-07-18 @Saivineeth147 11m 57s 59.4% — 基线：所有线性层上的普通 LoRA r=16，3 个周期，余弦 LR。 没有任何技巧。 （报告）
1 2026-07-18 @Saivineeth147 6m 05s 61.1% −49% 序列打包+仅完成损失掩蔽，2 epoch。 与 #0 相同的 LoRA 配置；速度提高约 2 倍，精度更高。 （报告）
2 2026-07-20 @凝视 1m 53s 59.6% −69% 一个 4e-4 epoch 超过 3,000 个示例，具有 2x 优化器更新（集成 LR）、512 个令牌包。 第一个外部记录。 （报告）
3 2026-07-20 @凝视 1m 44s 60.3% −8% 最短 4k 数据修剪、1 个激进的 LR 纪元、剥离 <<...>> 注释、自定义 GPU 驻留打包循环、仅限分块完成的 CE（无完整 logits）。 （报告）

轨道 2 — SQuAD v1.1 · SmolLM2-1.7B · 目标 ≥ 75.5% · 1× L40S

当前记录：@Saivineeth147 的 11m 08s — 第 2 轨基线：SQuAD 上的普通 LoRA r=16，前 20k 个示例，1 个时期，全序列丢失。 没有任何技巧。

# Date 作者 列车时间 GSM8K/EM Δ 技术
0 2026-07-20 @Saivineeth147 11m 08s 77.5% — Track 2 基线：SQuAD 上的普通 LoRA r=16，前 20k 个示例，1 个时期，全序列丢失。 没有任何技巧。 （报告）

带有验证报告的完整历史记录：records/RECORDS.md · 实时排行榜：huggingface.co/spaces/vineeth98/lora-speedrun

曲目

两条冻结的赛道，故意不同的模型系列和任务类型——因此只有在两者上都获胜的技术才能证明通用性。 到处都有相同的硬件、上限和验证。

Track 1 Track 2
基础型号 Qwen/Qwen2.5-1.5B HuggingFaceTB/SmolLM2-1.7B
Task GSM8K 数学 → ≥ 57.0% 精确匹配 SQuAD v1.1 QA → ≥ 75.5% EM
训练数据 仅 GSM8K 列车分体 仅 SQuAD 列车分割
公制 训练挂钟。 较低的胜利。 same
硬件 1× L40S (48 GB)，模态沙箱 same
约束 仅适配器，≤ 30M 可训练参数 same

机器可读规范：spec.yaml·spec-t2.yaml。 完整规则：TASK.md。

您可以控制其他一切：LoRA 排名和放置、量化、学习率计划、序列打包、数据子集选择和排序、自定义内核、何时停止。 如果您可以通过 1,000 个精心挑选的示例，进行 90 秒的训练。

为什么存在这个

我根据预算对小型模型进行了微调，但我无法判断哪些加速声明是真实的。 每一种技术——DoRA、rsLoRA、Unsloth、打包技巧——都会报告不同模型、数据和硬件的数字。 实际上，这些主张是不可证伪的。

我见过的唯一真正解决争论的方式是与裁判一起进行冻结任务。 这就是 nanoGPT 的 speedrun 对预训练优化器所做的事情（Muon 就是从中诞生的）。 这也是微调的同一个舞台。

它的目标是：一个经过验证的公共记录，记录哪些训练技巧可以在挂钟中得到回报，哪些无法复制。 每条记录都必须在其文字中解释其机制，因此排行榜兼作实验室笔记本——被拒绝的变体部分通常与记录一样有用。 而且由于技巧可能会过度适应一种设置，因此会在具有不同模型系列和任务类型的轨道上实时记录：一项技术只能通过转移来证明通用性。

快速入门

官方硬件运行（免费）。 创建一个 Modal 帐户，然后：

git clone https://github.com/Saivineeth147/lora-speedrun && cd lora-speedrun
pip install modal pyyaml && modal setup      # one-time browser auth

python harness/modal_verify.py --prefetch    # one-time: cache model + data in a volume

# one timed, evaluated attempt of the baseline on the exact spec hardware:
python harness/modal_verify.py --submission submissions/000-baseline --runs 1

# full record-style verification (3 fresh seeds, all must pass):
python harness/modal_verify.py --submission submissions/000-baseline --runs 3

局部迭代（可选）。 任何 24 GB 以上的卡都会运行快速实验的基线 — bash script/setup_gpu.sh，然后是 pythonharness/run_submission.pysubmissions/000-baseline --runs 1。 当地时间不是官方时间；排行榜时钟是 Modal L40S。

然后复制提交/TEMPLATE/，使其更快，并打开 PR。 请参阅 CONTRIBUTING.md。

如何验证记录

真实的验证，从日志重播（种子 463953844，时间压缩）：训练 → 完整性 + 适配器审核 → 评估 → 3 种子判决。

  1. 您可以使用训练脚本、配置、注释和自我报告的数字打开 PR。
  2. CI 对其进行静态验证，自动 Claude 安全屏幕会审查差异（渗透尝试、网络使用、线束篡改、测试集接触）并公开发布其发现。
  3. 维护人员审查代码，然后评论/验证 - 这会在规范 L40S 上的网络阻塞 Modal 沙箱中使用新鲜种子重新运行您的提交 3 倍。 所有 3 次运行都必须清除目标；官方时间是平均值。
  4. 线束审核适配器参数计数并重新验证模型/数据内容哈希（防篡改），验证报告发布在 PR 上并提交记录/验证/并带有接受/拒绝推理。

完整协议、标题和威胁模型：JUDGING.md · SECURITY.md。

尚未有人认领的创意

到目前为止：序列打包+仅完成掩码（记录#1）。

领取第一名，跑完 6 米 05 秒，将你的名字写在黑板上。

FAQ

这是 LoRa 无线电协议吗？ 不——LoRA（低阶适应），微调语言模型的标准廉价方法：在冻结模型上训练一个小适配器。 竞赛：每个人在相同的 GPU 上对相同的模型进行微调以达到相同的分数，并且最快的经过验证的训练运行保持着记录。

技术是否会过度适应一种模型+一项任务？ 这正是为什么有两个具有不同模型系列和任务类型的轨道 - 并且更多轨道将遵循相同的冻结和校准协议。 仅在一条赛道上获胜的技巧就是一项记录，但值得信赖的技术是那些可以转移的技术。 轨道系统使之成为一个经验问题，而不是一个争论。

为什么选择Qwen2.5-1.5B？ 难道不是经过数学预训练的吗？ 可能，就像每个现代基础模型一样。 没关系：目标是一个锚点，而不是关于数学发现的主张。 比赛是有趣的部分——同样的原因，nanoGPT 速度跑的目标是任意的 val 损失。 （轨道 2 使用不同的系列，SmolLM2，部分原因也是如此。）

为什么用挂钟而不是 FLOPs 或步骤？ 因为挂钟是你付出代价的，它迫使内核、数据加载和算法以相同的货币进行竞争。 与 modded-nanogpt 相同的规则。

为什么在 Modal 上使用 L40S 而不是 4090 或 H100？ 三个原因。 它是一个一致的数据中心 SKU，因此时间实际上是可比的（租用的消费者卡因主机而异）。 它可以通过 Modal 的每月积分免费使用，因此竞争和重新验证不需要任何费用。 提交的内容是陌生人的代码——模态沙箱在网络封锁和秘密的情况下运行它们。 （L40S 与 4090 是相同的 AD102 芯片，因此消费者 GPU 技巧可以转移。）

我可以训练其他数据/从更大的模型中提取数据吗？ 不。仅 GSM8K 列车分割，没有教师模型，没有合成数据。 请参阅 TASK.md 了解完整的禁止列表。

多个 GPU？ 一号L40S。 这就是重点。

执照

和。 记录、报告和文章与代码一样公开。
